milestones.title: 2D Ising verification
Finite-size scaling
Critical exponent β from data collapse of M·L^(β/ν) vs (T-T_c)·L^(1/ν)
Specific heat curve C(T)
Verify lattice geometries beyond square
3D simple cubic Ising
Potts model (q-state)
2D XY model
2D Heisenberg (continuous spins)
Antiferromagnetic Ising on a bipartite lattice (same as ferromagnetic by sign-flip — sanity check the framework handles negative J cleanly)
Edwards-Anderson spin glass on a 2D square lattice
3D EA spin glass — the harder, more famous case
Triangular lattice antiferromagnet — frustrated, ordered ground states are degenerate
Random-bond Ising (binary disorder p% antiferromagnetic bonds)
Glauber dynamics relaxation
Aging in spin glasses
KPZ growth on circular geometry — interfaces wrapping around a torus, GUE-Tracy-Widom distribution of fluctuations
Directed percolation in 2+1d at the absorbing-state transition
Calibrate the number stack
Run one assigned GIMPS exponent (PRP + proof) to completion and submit the residue
Extend an existing OEIS sequence's b-file by N verified terms (or submit a new sequence) and get it accepted
Join PrimeGrid and complete validated work units on an open prime problem (Proth / Sierpiński)
Calibrate photometry
Recover a known variable star's light curve and period; register an AAVSO observer code and submit one validated observation
Reprocess one open LIGO/Virgo event from GWOSC and reproduce its published chirp mass within error
Blind transit search across one TESS sector; vet the candidates and report a recovered planet
Calibrate the CMOS as a particle detector
Log cosmic-ray muon candidates for a month; check the rate against the ~1 / cm² / min expectation and the zenith-angle dependence
Stand up a hardware-entropy beacon
Join a team and complete validated work units on Einstein@Home (continuous-gravitational-wave / pulsar search)
Complete validated units on Rosetta@home or World Community Grid; archive the credit record

latest_report.headline: χ peaked at T≈2.300 vs Onsager 2.2692 · 37s on GPU
